title: Add JSDoc to NodeFsBackend
description: PRD §5.2 requires JSDoc on all backend classes. NodeFsBackend (src/backends/node-fs.ts) has zero JSDoc comments while all 5 other backends have full JSDoc. Add class-level and method-level JSDoc comments to NodeFsBackend matching the style of other backends (agentic-store.ts, opfs.ts, memory.ts, local-storage.ts, sqlite.ts). This is the last remaining PRD gap preventing full compliance.
